one_line_verdict: Best suited for fans of raw Indian action dramas and Anurag Kashyap's gritty style — worth a streaming watch, but not a must-see on the big screen.
english_note: Heavy Telugu/Hindi accents, rapid regional dialogue, and culture-specific emotional cues may challenge non-South-Asian viewers.
credits_detail: No post-credits scene expected — typical of Indian action dramas of this scale. (Speculative)
one_line_summary: A gritty revenge tale of love and betrayal — raw, dark, and best saved for streaming.
